notes: Quarter-end tape constructive (Nasdaq +20% qtr, VIX calm at 16.6, day P&L green) but bubble-fear headlines and a Grantham crash warning add caution; cash thin at $53 and payrolls Friday keep me at 0.5 with no reach.
journal_entry: Tue 6/30 14:25: VIX eased to 16.6, holding neutral/0.5 into a green quarter-end afternoon. AMAT record-high stays favored; MU/SNDK soft, ABCL/FCEL overextended remain no-chase. Watching bubble-fear chatter and bracing for Friday jobs; cash $53 still caps any add.
